action.reasoning: Observation: The train.py script is failing due to a RuntimeError in the prepare_batch_for_pi0 function at line 143. The error occurs when trying to concatenate language tokens with torch.cat(), where tensors have mismatched sizes (expected size 20 but got size 19 for tensor number 1). This is happening because the language tokenization is producing tensors of different lengths even though padding=True was specified. Analysis: The issue is in the language processing section of prepare_batch_for_pi0 where individual instructions are being processed separately, resulting in tensors of different sequence lengths. When these are concatenated along dimension 0, they must have the same size in all other dimensions. The solution is to ensure all language tokens have the same length by applying consistent padding. Decision: Fix the language tokenization in prepare_batch_for_pi0 to ensure all tensors have the same sequence length before concatenation.
